current_suggestion.pitch: You're getting mental models from Lex and Rogan's long-form interviews, but Farnam Street is the primary source — Shane Parrish goes deeper on Munger-style thinking, decision-making under uncertainty, and first-principles reasoning than any channel you're currently watching. He covers the same intellectual territory as ModernWisdom but with less celebrity-guest format and more direct engagement with ideas like inversion, second-order effects, and how experts actually think. Format is a mix of solo essays and interviews, typically 45–90 minutes, with a strong emphasis on how to reduce noise in your own reasoning.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
EP Wealth Advisors (with Ben Felix-style rigor — try 'The Plain Bagel' instead)
Odyssey of the Mind (William MacAskill / 80,000 Hours)
